meta.summary: Bioconductor DADA2 1.40.0 R runtime for exact amplicon sequence variant inference, chimera removal, and taxonomy assignment.
meta.description: Bioconductor DADA2 1.40.0 R runtime for exact amplicon sequence variant inference, chimera removal, and taxonomy assignment.

test: Rscript --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'Rscript (R) version 4.6.0' >/dev/null && Rscript -e 'stopifnot(as.character(BiocManager::version()) == "3.23"); stopifnot(as.character(packageVersion("dada2")) == "1.40.0")' && dada2-runtime-info | grep -F 'dada2	1.40.0' >/dev/null

Rscript -e 'pkgs <- c("dada2","Biostrings","ShortRead","Rcpp","RcppParallel","IRanges","XVector","BiocGenerics","ggplot2","reshape2"); missing <- pkgs[!vapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly=TRUE)]; if (length(missing)) stop(paste("missing", paste(missing, collapse=",")))'

Rscript -e 'suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dada2)); fs <- c("filterAndTrim","derepFastq","dada","makeSequenceTable","removeBimeraDenovo","assignTaxonomy"); missing <- fs[!vapply(fs, exists, logical(1), where=asNamespace("dada2"), inherits=FALSE)]; if (length(missing)) stop(paste("missing functions", paste(missing, collapse=",")))'

tmp=/tmp/taf-dada2-index-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; Rscript /opt/dada2/share/testdata/dada2-smoke.R "$tmp" | grep -F 'dada2_smoke_ok' >/dev/null && test -s "$tmp/sequence_table_nochim.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/taxonomy.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/filter_track.tsv" && grep -F 'dada2_version	1.40.0' "$tmp/smoke_summary.tsv" >/dev/null && rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: DADA2
upstream.citation: Callahan et al. 2016, DADA2: High-resolution sample inference from Illumina amplicon data, Nature Methods
